substance_notes: Orange S.A. has held its stake in Orange Polska S.A. since the early 2000s (well in excess of 2 years). Royalty payments relate to brand and technology licences under the Orange trademark — DEMPE functions (R&D strategy, brand governance, IP protection) are controlled centrally by Orange S.A. Annual royalty payments from Orange Polska to Orange S.A. are estimated to significantly exceed PLN 2,000,000. Orange S.A. is a related party under Art. 11a CIT (controlling shareholder). Verify whether Art. 12 of the 1975 Poland-France DTC covers brand and technology licence fees.
